commands.repair_reason: This PR needs contributor real-behavior proof plus maintainer judgment on lossy event-log semantics and a security-sensitive path constraint before automation should repair or merge it.; Needs attention: The diff introduces an unconstrained file-write sink sourced from persisted ACPX session metadata.; Review finding: [P2] Validate the event log path before appending — extensions/acpx/src/runtime.ts:895-896 - [P2] E... (sha=3db2a0ca73adcde9d7d7dbfd6de70fc03b2b768c)
commands.review_summary:
This PR wraps ACPX `runTurn` events with a fire-and-forget writer that creates the parent directory and appends projected `AcpRuntimeEvent` NDJSON frames to the session record's `eventLog.active_path`, plus a new unit test file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main advertises `eventLog.active_path` through `acpx@0.6.1` while `AcpxRuntime.runTurn` only delegates events and never writes that path. The contributor also supplied a deployed-container before-fix repro; I did not run a live ACP session in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This PR needs contributor real-behavior proof plus maintainer judgment on lossy event-log semantics and a security-sensitive path constraint before automation should repair or merge it.

target.title: fix(acpx): write per-event JSONL stream to advertised event_log.active_path
target.author: efpiva
